title: March 11
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|March}}

'''March 11''' is the 70th day of the year (71st in leap years). There are 295 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1950s#1956|1956]] – [[Rob Paulsen]] is born.
*[[1960s#1966|1966]] – [[Terese Nielsen]] is born.
*[[1979]] – [[The Constancia Affair]] serial begins at the [[Los Angeles Times Syndicate]], launching the Star Wars newspaper strips.
*[[1982]] – [[Robbie Daymond]] is born.
*[[1984]] – The final Star Wars newspaper comic strip is published by the [[Los Angeles Times Syndicate]].
*[[1993]] – [[Jodie Comer]] is born.
*[[1998]] – ''[[Dark Forces: Rebel Agent]]'' published.
*1998 – [[Shadows of the Empire: Evolution 2|''Shadows of the Empire: Evolution'' 2]] published.
*1998 – ''[[Masters of Teräs Käsi: Prima's Official Hints and Tips]]'' published.
*[[2001]] – ''[[Star Wars: Episode I: Battle for Naboo]]'' released on [[Wikipedia:Personal computer|PC]].
*[[2005]] – [[Star Wars Insider 81|''Star Wars Insider'' 81]] released for subscribers.
*[[2008]] – [[Star Wars Insider 100|''Star Wars Insider'' 100]] published.
*[[2011]] – "[[Citadel Rescue]]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*[[2013]] – End of [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars|''The Clone Wars'']] announced.
*[[2014]] – [[Star Wars Insider 148|''Star Wars Insider'' 148]] published.
*[[2015]] – [[Star Wars (2015) 3|''Star Wars'' (2015) 3]] published.
*[[2017]] – "[[Double Agent Droid]]" airs on [[Disney XD]].
*[[2020]] – [[Bounty Hunters 1|''Bounty Hunters'' 1]] published.
*2020 – [[Darth Vader (2020) 2|''Darth Vader'' (2020) 2]] published.
*2020 – [[The Rise of Kylo Ren 4|''The Rise of Kylo Ren'' 4]] published.
*[[2025]] – ''[[The High Republic: Temptation of the Force]]'' reprinted in paperback.
*2025 – ''[[Star Wars: Complete Locations, New Edition]]'' published in the US.
*2025 – [[Clive Revill]] dies.
<noinclude>
